# OD9 - Off Da Nine

> Chicago-based music collective and creative innovation group producing original hip-hop, R&B, and funk music. Part of the F.R.E.S.H. platform ecosystem. OD9 builds frameworks for advancing humanity toward Type I civilization through STEAM optimization.

## About
- [Home](https://offda9.com/)
- [Da Crew - Meet the Members](https://offda9.com/da-crew.php)
- [The OD9 Framework](https://offda9.com/framework.php)

## Music
- [Music Catalog](https://offda9.com/music.php)
- [Missing In Action - Joey P. (Spotify)](https://open.spotify.com/album/7jnkBN83bZO0YTsORUrKBZ)
- [Outrageous EP - The Ultimate Rage (Spotify)](https://open.spotify.com/album/6V3kmOLMgNgsCLrRJaMiN3)
